category_sources: Official MicroPython documentation describes mpremote as remote control for MicroPython devices.
source_facts.description says tool for interacting remotely with MicroPython devices.
display_name_sources: Official MicroPython documentation page title uses mpremote.
docs_sources: Official MicroPython documentation page is the dedicated mpremote reference.
repo_sources: Official MicroPython GitHub repository contains the tools/mpremote source tree.
Official mpremote documentation identifies it as the MicroPython remote-control tool.
tags_sources: Official mpremote docs list serial connection, REPL, filesystem, eval/exec, mount, and package commands.
